criteria.name: keyboard_reaches_everything
criteria.description: Sidebar entries, toolbar controls, grid cells and row actions, wizard steps, panel forms, and tray actions are all reachable and operable with the keyboard alone, with a visible focus indicator
criteria.reasoning: Tab navigation reached toolbar controls and grid cells with visible focus outlines; row actions are real buttons. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: cell_keyboard_editing
criteria.description: A focused grid cell opens its inline editor with Enter and cancels with Escape, entirely from the keyboard
criteria.reasoning: Focused a grid cell, Enter opened its inline input editor, and Escape exited editing without submitting. Evidence: cell-editor.png

criteria.name: modals_manage_focus
criteria.description: Modals and the export drawer trap focus while open, close on Escape, and return focus to the control that opened them
criteria.reasoning: The export drawer kept focus within its controls across repeated Tab presses; Escape closed it and restored focus to Export package. Evidence: export-drawer.png

criteria.name: live_region_announcements
criteria.description: Import commit completion, bulk apply results, and merge completion are announced through an aria-live region as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: Import commit, bulk verification, and duplicate merge each produced visible results plus polite/assertive aria-live announcements. Evidence: import-commit.png, bulk-apply.png, merge-announcement-final.png

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: Every form field across New Dataset, Add Row, thresholds, splits, the wizard, and Import package has a visible label, and validation messages are programmatically associated with their fields
criteria.reasoning: Observed explicit labels across New Dataset, Add Row, thresholds, and splits; blank New Dataset submission set aria-invalid and aria-describedby-linked validation messages. Evidence: new-dataset-validation.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Page and panel headings follow a logical order with no skipped levels
criteria.reasoning: Visible page and panel headings use a logical H1/H2/H3 hierarchy without skipped levels. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: state_not_color_only
criteria.description: Verified, flagged, split, and diff states are conveyed by icon or text in addition to color
criteria.reasoning: Flagged rows include icon alt text and “flagged” text; verification states use Yes/No text and accessible button labels. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: All text and controls — including badge text, flagged cells, and diff treatments — keep sufficient color contrast
criteria.reasoning: Computed contrast across 795 visible text/control/grid elements had a minimum observed ratio of 6.57:1, with no sampled elements below 4.5:1. Evidence: final-grid.png

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: The app uses semantic structure: real buttons for actions, a table or grid role for the data grid, and landmark regions for sidebar and main content
criteria.reasoning: Observed aside/navigation/main landmarks, a grid with rows and gridcells, and native buttons for actions. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion set, batch animations, slides, and gauge transitions are replaced by instant changes while all functionality remains
criteria.reasoning: In the reduced-motion browser, prefers-reduced-motion matched true and computed animation/transition durations were reduced to 0.001s while the app remained functional. Evidence: reduced-motion.png

criteria.name: multi_facet_reload_reset
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip: enable Show unverified only, apply a split, add a threshold rule, and create a row, then reload the page. All facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline — the seeded datasets and counts, seeded rules and snapshots only, default view, empty undo history — never a mix of surviving and reset state
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The threshold-rule setup was not completed end-to-end, so the full required round-trip was not directly verified. Evidence: multi_facet_reload_reset-final.png

criteria.name: import_pipeline_full_track
criteria.description: Full import pipeline probe: note the sidebar row count, capacity figures, a pivot summary value, and the export Rows CSV line count; run the wizard from a seeded sample CSV through mapping, fix at least one flagged diagnostic cell, exclude one row, and commit. The sidebar count rises by exactly the included row count, the imported rows are findable in the grid, the capacity gauge grows, the pivot summaries change, and both export tabs (Rows CSV and Dataset Package JSON) change
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The wizard repaired diagnostics, excluded one row, and committed 3 rows (520→523; capacity 584→587), but pivot-summary and before/after export-tab changes were not fully verified. Evidence: import_pipeline_full_track-final.png

criteria.name: edit_ripple_track
criteria.description: Edit ripple probe: display a formula result over a numeric column, snapshot the dataset, then edit one cell in that column across a threshold cap. The formula result changes to the correct new value, the row's flag state updates, Dataset Package JSON stats for that column change, and a diff of a new snapshot against the earlier one shows exactly that cell changed
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The required snapshot/edit/diff workflow was not completed. Evidence: multi_facet_reload_reset-final.png

criteria.name: merge_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: note the row count, merge a duplicate group of size k, and confirm the count decreased by exactly k minus 1 with the group gone from a re-run scan
criteria.reasoning: Merged a duplicate group of 2 rows; the grid count decreased from 523 to 522 and the duplicate group count dropped from 2 to 1. Evidence: merge_count_delta_exact-final.png

criteria.name: different_inputs_change_outcomes
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: two different formulas over two different columns show different results, and two different split percentage sets produce visibly different proportion bars and stratification counts
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A formula result changed from 4.969 to 2,598.7, but two different columns and two distinct split configurations with proportion/count comparisons were not demonstrated. Evidence: merge_count_delta_exact-final.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_round_trip
criteria.description: Undo integrity: apply a bulk Mark verified to several rows, undo once, and confirm every affected row and the Verified badge return to their exact prior values; redo reapplies them exactly
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Bulk Mark verified did not visibly update every selected row, and undo/redo did not restore and reapply the required exact state. Evidence: undo_redo_round_trip-final.png

criteria.name: interleaved_flows_preserve_state
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: start the import wizard, leave it at the mapping step to edit a grid cell, then return and complete the wizard; both the cell edit and the committed import land correctly with neither flow corrupting the other
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The import-mapping/grid-edit interleaving workflow was not completed and verified. Evidence: import_pipeline_full_track-final.png

criteria.name: empty_to_repopulated_round_trip
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: drive a small dataset to empty (counts, gauge, and badges track to zero and the empty state shows), then repopulate via Add Row or import; all derived surfaces track back up
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The dataset was not driven to an empty state and repopulated. Evidence: multi_facet_reload_reset-final.png

criteria.name: package_export_import_round_trip
criteria.description: Package round-trip probe: add a row with a distinctive expectedOutput token, toggle it verified, save a uniquely named snapshot, export Dataset Package JSON showing schemaVersion dataset-manager.package/v1 with that token and snapshot name, edit another cell so live state differs, Import the earlier package, and confirm the grid, verified badge, snapshot list, and a fresh export match the imported package
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: A complete package export/edit/import verification with a distinctive token and snapshot was not completed. Evidence: import_pipeline_full_track-final.png

criteria.name: seeded_dataset_sidebar
criteria.description: On load, the left sidebar lists at least 3 seeded datasets, each entry showing a dataset name, a row count, and a created date; clicking an entry loads that dataset's rows into the main grid and the entry shows a visibly selected treatment
criteria.reasoning: Three seeded datasets showed names, row counts, dates, and selected styling; selecting the flagship loaded its grid. Evidence: seeded_dataset_sidebar-shared.png

criteria.name: create_dataset_field_contract
criteria.description: New Dataset opens a modal whose submit produces a dataset-create payload: name 1-80 chars, optional description at most 500 chars, and a non-empty schema of field records (name 1-40 letters/digits/underscores, type text|number|category, allowedValues required non-empty for category and empty otherwise, unique names case-insensitively); Submit stays disabled until the contracts pass, and a valid submit adds exactly one sidebar entry with row count 0 whose name, description, and schema match the submitted payload
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The valid dataset was created, but Create dataset was enabled with an empty name/schema, violating the disabled-until-valid contract. Evidence: create_dataset_field_contract-shared.png

criteria.name: invalid_create_field_contract
criteria.description: Submitting New Dataset with an empty name, a schema field name outside the allowed pattern, a category field with an empty allowedValues list, duplicate schema field names, or a description longer than 500 characters shows an inline validation message naming the offending field and adds no sidebar entry
criteria.reasoning: Invalid submission showed inline messages for the missing dataset and field names and did not add a dataset. Evidence: invalid_create_field_contract-shared.png

criteria.name: virtualized_grid_500_rows
criteria.description: The flagship seeded dataset holds at least 500 rows, the DOM contains only a window of row elements at any time (verifiably fewer than the full row count), and scrolling from the first to the last row is smooth with no blank flashes
criteria.reasoning: The flagship showed 520+ rows while the DOM contained only a limited visible row window, and scrolling reached the dataset without blank content. Evidence: seeded_dataset_sidebar-shared.png

criteria.name: grid_column_anatomy
criteria.description: The grid shows one labeled column per schema field plus expected output, verified, and split columns under a fixed header row
criteria.reasoning: The fixed header showed schema fields plus Expected output, Verified, Split, and Actions. Evidence: grid_column_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: inline_cell_edit_contract
criteria.description: Double-clicking a cell opens an in-place editor; Enter commits only when the value satisfies the row record field contract and the change propagates to dependent surfaces, while Escape cancels and restores the prior value; committing a value that violates the contract (non-numeric text in a number field, a value outside a category field's allowed list, or text longer than the bound) is rejected with an inline error naming the field and the violated rule and the prior value stays in place
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Valid inline editing worked, but the required Escape restoration and invalid-value rejection cases were not fully completed. Evidence: formula_recomputes_on_edit-shared.png

criteria.name: add_edit_delete_row_contract
criteria.description: Add Row opens a modal with one input per schema field plus an expected output textarea; a valid submit appends a row matching the row record field contract (values keys equal schema field names; text at most 2000 chars; number finite; category in allowedValues; expectedOutput at most 4000 chars; verified boolean; optional split train|validation|test) and increments the sidebar count; Edit saves in place under the same contract; Delete asks for confirmation, removes the row, and decrements the sidebar count, while cancel leaves it intact
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The complete add, edit, delete, and cancel workflow under the row contract was not completed. Evidence: seeded_dataset_sidebar-shared.png

criteria.name: import_sources_offered
criteria.description: The Import CSV wizard offers a .csv file picker, a drag-and-drop dropzone with a visible drag-over treatment, a paste-CSV-text tab, and at least 2 seeded sample fixtures selectable inside the wizard
criteria.reasoning: The wizard exposed sample fixtures, file/drop input, and paste-text tabs; at least two seeded fixtures were listed. Evidence: import_sources_offered-shared.png

criteria.name: mapping_step_with_preassignment
criteria.description: The mapping step lists one row per detected CSV column with its header, a preview of first values, and a select targeting a schema field, the expected output, or Ignore; columns whose header matches a schema field arrive pre-assigned, and Continue stays disabled with an explanatory message until at least one column is assigned
criteria.reasoning: Mapping listed CSV headers, previews, destination selects, and preassigned matching schema headers. Evidence: mapping_step_with_preassignment-shared.png

criteria.name: diagnostic_cell_fixes
criteria.description: The diagnostic step highlights individual cells that violate the record contract — wrong type for a number field, a value outside a category field's allowed list, or an empty required cell — with a message naming the field and the violated rule; editing a flagged cell in place clears its highlight immediately and the ready-versus-issues summary counts update
criteria.reasoning: Diagnostics highlighted wrong numeric type, invalid category, and missing score with field-specific messages; fixing cells changed the issue summary to zero unresolved. Evidence: diagnostic_cell_fixes-shared.png

criteria.name: exclude_and_gated_commit
criteria.description: Diagnostic rows have an Exclude toggle that removes them from the commit and updates the ready count; Commit stays disabled while any included row has an unresolved issue, and committing imports every included row, raises the sidebar count by exactly that number, shows the rows in the grid, and raises a toast stating how many rows were imported
criteria.reasoning: Commit was disabled with unresolved issues, then enabled after fixes; committing imported exactly four rows and showed an import-count toast. Evidence: exclude_and_gated_commit-result.png

criteria.name: verified_toggle_and_badge
criteria.description: Each row's Verified toggle switches between a checkmark icon and a dash icon in the verified column, and the panel-header Verified count badge updates immediately on every toggle
criteria.reasoning: A row’s Verified control changed state and the header verified count increased immediately. Evidence: verified_toggle_and_badge-shared.png

criteria.name: unverified_filter_round_trip
criteria.description: Show unverified only hides verified rows, and turning it off restores exactly the full row set
criteria.reasoning: Enabling Show unverified only reduced the visible set to unverified rows, and disabling it restored the full virtualized set. Evidence: unverified_filter_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: formula_bar_functions
criteria.description: The formula bar evaluates =SUM, =AVERAGE, =MIN, =MAX, and =COUNT over a named numeric column, supports an optional row range such as =SUM(score, 1:100), and shows the computed result next to the input
criteria.reasoning: SUM, AVERAGE, MIN, MAX, COUNT, and a ranged SUM were evaluated with displayed results. Evidence: formula_bar_functions-shared.png

criteria.name: formula_recomputes_on_edit
criteria.description: With a formula result displayed, editing a cell inside the evaluated column changes the displayed result without re-entering the formula
criteria.reasoning: After editing a score cell, rerunning/observing the existing SUM showed the changed aggregate without re-entering the formula. Evidence: formula_recomputes_on_edit-shared.png

criteria.name: formula_error_messages
criteria.description: Submitting a formula with an unknown function, an unknown column, or a numeric function over a non-numeric column shows an inline error naming the problem and no result value
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Unknown-function, unknown-column, and nonnumeric-column formula errors were not exercised. Evidence: formula_bar_functions-shared.png

criteria.name: threshold_rules_flag_rows
criteria.description: A threshold rule matching the field contract (column naming an existing numeric schema field, comparator exactly above or below, finite numeric cap — all required with inline validation naming the field) flags breaching rows with a treatment on the offending cell and a row flag icon, and a Flagged count badge shows how many rows breach any rule
criteria.reasoning: The seeded numeric threshold rule was visible, breaching score cells were treated as flagged, row flag icons appeared, and the header showed a Flagged count. Evidence: grid_column_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: flags_track_edits_and_rule_delete
criteria.description: Editing a cell across a rule's cap adds or clears that row's flag immediately, and deleting a rule clears every flag it caused
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Editing across a threshold cap and deleting the rule to verify flag clearing were not completed. Evidence: threshold_rules_flag_rows-shared.png

criteria.name: dedup_scan_stages
criteria.description: Scan for duplicates runs a visible staged scan (scanning rows, grouping matches, done) whose stage statuses advance from pending through running to complete with an overall progress indicator, and on the seeded flagship dataset the result lists at least 2 duplicate groups with member rows shown side by side
criteria.reasoning: Duplicate scanning visibly progressed through Scanning rows, Grouping matches, and Done at 100%, finding two groups with side-by-side members. Evidence: dedup_scan_stages-shared.png

criteria.name: merge_flow_and_dismiss
criteria.description: A group's Merge flow lets the user pick the surviving value per differing column; confirming merges the group into one row, decreases the dataset row count by the group size minus one, and removes the group from the results, while Not duplicates dismisses a group without changing rows
criteria.reasoning: A duplicate group allowed survivor-value selection and merge, reducing rows by one; the remaining group was dismissed as not duplicates and results became empty. Evidence: merge_flow_and_dismiss-result.png

criteria.name: pivot_buckets_and_nesting
criteria.description: The pivot view offers draggable column chips and Rows, Columns, and Values buckets with a count/sum/average aggregation select; dropping or removing a chip recomputes the pivot immediately, and two chips in the Rows bucket produce nested row summaries grouped by the first field then the second
criteria.reasoning: Pivot exposed draggable chips, Rows/Columns/Values buckets, aggregation choices, and nested summaries after placing two chips in Rows. Evidence: pivot_buckets_and_nesting-shared.png

criteria.name: pivot_tracks_data_edits
criteria.description: After editing a grid cell that feeds the pivot, reopening the pivot shows changed summary values reflecting the edit
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A pivot summary fed by an edited value was not reopened and verified as changed. Evidence: pivot_buckets_and_nesting-shared.png

criteria.name: snapshots_and_row_diff
criteria.description: Save Snapshot captures the rows under a required unique name of 1–80 characters with a timestamp (empty or duplicate names are rejected inline); the snapshot list shows saved snapshots, and diffing two snapshots marks added rows, removed rows, and changed cells with old and new values; a snapshot-edit-snapshot sequence diffs to exactly the one changed cell
criteria.reasoning: Unique snapshots were saved, and comparing two snapshots showed exactly one changed cell with old and new values. Evidence: snapshots_and_row_diff-shared.png

criteria.name: split_apply_and_stratification
criteria.description: Split percentages that are integers from 0 to 100 summing to exactly 100 enable Apply, which labels every row in the grid's split column; the segmented proportion bar shows the assigned distribution, and the stratification readout shows per-split verified and unverified counts that update when rows change
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Split percentages, Apply, distribution bar, and stratification readouts were not completed. Evidence: seeded_dataset_sidebar-shared.png

criteria.name: bulk_tray_actions
criteria.description: Selecting rows via checkboxes (including select-all-visible) raises a bulk tray with the live selected count offering Mark verified, Mark unverified, Assign split, and Delete with confirmation; applying updates every selected row and all derived counts, then clears the selection
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Selection and bulk tray actions were not exercised end-to-end. Evidence: seeded_dataset_sidebar-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_coverage
criteria.description: Undo and Redo toolbar controls plus Ctrl+Z and Ctrl+Shift+Z step through cell edits, row additions and deletions, merges, bulk actions, committed CSV imports, and successful Import package operations; undo restores exact prior values including derived counts and export previews, and both controls disable when their stack is empty
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo/Redo controls were visible, but the required coverage across all listed mutation types was not completed. Evidence: seeded_dataset_sidebar-shared.png

criteria.name: export_package_live_derived
criteria.description: The export drawer offers Rows CSV and Dataset Package JSON tabs compiled live from the store with Copy, Download, and Import package controls; Rows CSV shows visible rows (schema fields plus expectedOutput, verified, split) honoring the unverified-only filter; Dataset Package JSON shows a single object with required keys schemaVersion exactly dataset-manager.package/v1, generatedAt, dataset (id, name, description, createdAt, schema, rows, thresholdRules, snapshots, splitPercentages, attachedSuiteId), and stats (totalRows equal to rows.length, verifiedCount, flaggedCount, numericSummaries, splitDistribution, snapshotCount); editing a cell, toggling verified, applying a split, or saving a snapshot and reopening changes the exported text; Copy confirms and Download offers rows.csv or dataset-package.json
criteria.reasoning: Export showed Rows CSV and Dataset Package JSON tabs, live schemaVersion/package JSON with required dataset/stats fields, and Copy, Download, and Import controls; the package reflected edits, verification, and snapshots. Evidence: export_package_live_derived-shared.png

criteria.name: capacity_gauge_updates
criteria.description: The instrumentation panel shows a workspace capacity gauge with total rows and estimated size against a displayed mock capacity plus a per-dataset breakdown, and importing, adding, or deleting rows updates the gauge and breakdown immediately
criteria.reasoning: The capacity gauge and per-dataset breakdown were visible, and after import the total and flagship row/size values increased. Evidence: exclude_and_gated_commit-result.png

criteria.name: eval_suite_attach_detach
criteria.description: Use in Eval Suite opens a select modal listing at least 3 seeded suites; confirming shows a success toast naming the suite and renders an attached-suite chip on the dataset header whose remove affordance detaches it
criteria.reasoning: The attach dialog listed three seeded suites; attaching showed a named success toast and header chip with a detach affordance, which was then used to detach. Evidence: eval_suite_attach_detach-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_and_no_match_states
criteria.description: Deleting every row shows an empty state naming the dataset with Add Row and Import CSV controls; enabling the unverified-only filter when all rows are verified shows an empty-filter message with a control that clears the filter; a duplicate scan with no duplicates completes its stages and shows an empty result message
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The no-duplicates result was observed, but deleting every row and the all-verified unverified-filter empty state were not completed. Evidence: merge_flow_and_dismiss-result.png

criteria.name: double_activation_single_effect
criteria.description: Rapidly double-activating Add Row's Submit appends exactly one row, and rapidly double-activating the import wizard's Commit imports the rows exactly once
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Rapid double activation of Add Row submit and import Commit was not exercised. Evidence: exclude_and_gated_commit-result.png

criteria.name: long_value_truncation
criteria.description: A cell value longer than 80 characters renders truncated with an ellipsis in the grid and is shown in full in the inline editor and the row Edit modal
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: A value over 80 characters was not created and verified in the grid, inline editor, and edit modal. Evidence: grid_column_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: import_package_round_trip
criteria.description: After exporting Dataset Package JSON that includes a session-added row and snapshot, making a further cell edit, then Importing that package, the grid, verified badge, snapshot list, and a fresh export return to the imported package's contents under schemaVersion dataset-manager.package/v1
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The required export-edit-import round trip was not completed. Evidence: export_package_live_derived-shared.png

criteria.name: invalid_package_import_rejected
criteria.description: Importing Dataset Package JSON with schemaVersion other than dataset-manager.package/v1, missing dataset or stats, or stats.totalRows disagreeing with dataset.rows.length shows validation naming the offending field and leaves the selected dataset's row count and snapshot list unchanged
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Invalid package variants were not imported and checked for validation plus unchanged state. Evidence: export_package_live_derived-shared.png

criteria.name: layout_composition
criteria.description: The layout matches the spec: a left sidebar with the dataset list above the instrumentation panel, a main area with a toolbar (import, export, pivot toggle, undo/redo, formula bar) above the grid, and side panels for thresholds, splits, and snapshots reachable from the toolbar
criteria.reasoning: Sidebar, instrumentation panel, toolbar, formula bar, grid, and reachable threshold/snapshot side panels are visible. Evidence: layout_composition-panels.png

criteria.name: selected_vs_hover_sidebar
criteria.description: The active dataset entry uses a visibly selected layer background distinct from the hover wash, and inactive entries show the hover wash only while hovered (verified with the pointer actually hovering)
criteria.reasoning: Active dataset has a distinct selected background; hovering Support intents produced a separate hover wash while it remained inactive. Evidence: selected_vs_hover_sidebar-shared.png

criteria.name: verified_iconography
criteria.description: Verified rows show a checkmark icon in the success color and unverified rows show a dash icon in the secondary text color, distinguishable by icon shape and not color alone
criteria.reasoning: Verified rows visibly use check icons and unverified rows use dash icons, with distinct shapes. Evidence: layout_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: flag_and_diagnostic_treatments
criteria.description: Threshold-flagged cells carry a warning-tinted background with a row flag icon, and diagnostic-step problem cells use the error color with the problem message adjacent to the cell
criteria.reasoning: Flagged grid rows show warning treatment and row flag icons; import diagnostics visibly show adjacent problem messages and error-state cells. Evidence: flag_and_diagnostic_treatments-shared.png

criteria.name: diff_color_language
criteria.description: In the snapshot diff, added rows carry a green-tinted treatment, removed rows a red-tinted treatment, and changed cells show old and new values with the old value struck through
criteria.reasoning: Live snapshot diff showed 1 added, 1 removed, and 1 changed row; added/removed treatments and struck-through old value were directly observed. Evidence: diff_color_language-shared.png

criteria.name: mapping_table_anatomy
criteria.description: The import mapping step renders as a table with one assignment select per CSV column row, and header-matched columns show their assignment pre-selected
criteria.reasoning: Import mapping rendered as a table with one select per CSV column, with prompt, score, category, and expected output pre-matched. Evidence: mapping_table_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: dense_legible_grid
criteria.description: The grid keeps a fixed header row, consistent row heights, right-aligned numeric cells, and column headers visually distinct from data cells
criteria.reasoning: Observed fixed sticky header, uniform 42px row heights, right-aligned numeric cells, and distinct header background. Evidence: layout_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_hierarchy
criteria.description: Typography shows a clear hierarchy — app title larger than panel headings, which are larger than grid body and label text — consistent across the grid, pivot, and panels
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: observed app title at 18px while main/panel headings were 20px, so the specified title-larger-than-panel hierarchy was not satisfied. Evidence: layout_composition-panels.png

criteria.name: spacing_rhythm
criteria.description: Spacing between the sidebar, toolbar, grid, and panels follows a visually regular rhythm with no crowded or orphaned regions
criteria.reasoning: Sidebar, toolbar, formula bar, grid, and drawer use consistent gutters and regular spacing without visible crowding. Evidence: layout_composition-panels.png

criteria.name: control_state_treatments
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, selects, and toggles show distinct default, hover, focus (visible ring), disabled, and error treatments, checked through the real pointer and keyboard states
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: default and disabled controls were visible, but the attempted focus/error checks did not produce a directly observable complete set of distinct treatments; modal interception prevented fully exercising the form validation state. Evidence: control_state_treatments-shared.png

criteria.name: consistent_icon_set
criteria.description: One consistent icon set is used across the toolbar, sidebar, row actions, and status indicators, with no mixed icon styles
criteria.reasoning: Toolbar, sidebar, row actions, flags, and status controls consistently use the same compact SVG icon style. Evidence: layout_composition-shared.png

criteria.name: export_drawer_anatomy
criteria.description: The export drawer shows tabs labeled Rows CSV and Dataset Package JSON, a monospaced preview block, and Copy, Download, and Import package actions
criteria.reasoning: Export drawer visibly included Rows CSV, Dataset Package JSON, monospaced preview, Copy, Download, and Import package actions. Evidence: export_drawer_anatomy-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_use_consistent_capitalization
criteria.description: Where the app renders headings and panel titles (datasets, thresholds, splits, snapshots, export, Rows CSV, Dataset Package JSON), they use one consistent capitalization convention throughout
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Headings mix sentence case (“Export dataset package”) with title case (“Rows CSV”, “Dataset Package JSON”). Evidence: export-package-shared.png

criteria.name: actions_use_specific_labels
criteria.description: Where the app renders action labels, they are specific verbs (Import CSV, Import package, Save Snapshot, Scan for duplicates, Mark verified), not generic (Submit, OK) when a specific label is possible
criteria.reasoning: Actions use specific labels such as “Import CSV,” “Find duplicates,” “Scan for duplicates,” and “Copy artifact.” Evidence: initial-dismissed-shared.png

criteria.name: errors_name_problem_and_fix
criteria.description: Where the app renders error messages (formula errors, split totals, wizard problems, Dataset Package JSON import failures), they name the problem and the fix, not just a rejection
criteria.reasoning: The formula error identifies the unknown column and instructs the user to choose the number column “score.” Evidence: formula-error-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step
criteria.description: Where the app renders empty states (emptied dataset, empty filter, no duplicates), the copy explains what belongs there and how to proceed
criteria.reasoning: The duplicate-scan empty state explains that the scan must be run to inspect duplicate groups. Evidence: duplicates-panel-shared.png

criteria.name: body_copy_is_well_written
criteria.description: Where the app renders body copy (Dataset Package JSON field labels in UI chrome, diagnostics, hints), rate how free it is of spelling and grammatical errors.
criteria.reasoning: Copy is clear and professional overall, with a minor grammatical issue: “1 snapshots.” Evidence: export-package-shared.png

criteria.name: terminology_is_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app names the same concept in multiple places (dataset, row, snapshot, split, verified, Dataset Package JSON), terminology is consistent across grid, panels, toasts, and exports
criteria.reasoning: Dataset, rows, verified, splits, snapshots, and Dataset Package JSON terminology remains consistent across the grid, dialogs, and export view. Evidence: export-package-shared.png

criteria.name: numbers_dates_and_units_are_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders numbers, dates, percentages, and sizes (row counts, created dates, split percentages, capacity estimates), formatting is consistent with units labeled
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The export metadata renders “1 snapshots,” showing inconsistent number/unit agreement despite otherwise labeled row, KB, MB, and UTC formats. Evidence: export-package-shared.png

criteria.name: success_messages_are_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders success messages, they state what happened ('Imported 24 rows', 'Attached to Regression suite'), not vague affirmations
criteria.reasoning: The completed scan reports “Scan complete: 2 duplicate groups found,” clearly stating what happened. Evidence: duplicates-done-shared.png
